title: Notification when an item is deleted or archived
excerpt: It would be very useful to have a tool to receive an alert by email when an item is deleted or archived by other team member.

posts.author: IgnacioOrtiz (Ignacio Ortiz)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very useful to have a tool to receive an alert by email when an item is deleted or archived by other team member.

posts.author: NikolaMastilovic (Nikola Mastilovic (SpicyTab))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey there,

Just wanted to let you know that we built an app for this - Deleted Item Alerts!

posts.author: Susana (Susana)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey! This is super useful. I am quite tired of having to get an app for the most basic stuff on monday like this! I want them to add this to the basic functionality, I am not paying an additional 11$ a month when I am paying pro membership plus other 6 apps… just for 1 automation formula!!
Please, consider this monday!
